body_excerpt: In scalar32_min_max_and and related functions of verifier.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an incorrect bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In scalar32_min_max_and and related functions of verifier.c, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an incorrect bounds check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System exec
